headlines.title: Senate rebukes Trump by approving House-passed measure calling for end to Iran war
headlines.description: Passage of the largely symbolic measure comes as the U.S. and Iran are in the early stages of talks aimed at ending the war.

headlines.title: Homeland Security is changing guidelines for Iran soccer team’s next match
headlines.description: The Department of Homeland Security is changing the guidelines for Iran’s national soccer team ahead of its third World Cup match on Friday to accommodate extra time afforded to other countries in the tournament, a department spokesperson told NBC News

headlines.title: Erling Haaland powers Norway into the next round and keeps pace in Golden Boot race
headlines.description: On Monday, Norwegians were spotted across New York City dressed in red doing the “Viking row,” a fan ritual in which they sit side by side, packed tightly together as if on a ship and mimic as if they were rowing oars in unison.

headlines.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
headlines.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: Cristiano Ronaldo no se guardó nada y dejó varios titulares tras el partido
headlines.description: Cristiano Ronaldo protagonizó un intenso intercambio con la prensa, molestándose porque en el espacio estaba recibiendo sólo preguntas sobre su rivalidad con Lionel Messi. Incluso, retiró la palabra a uno de los periodistas y terminó molesto.

headlines.title: Inglaterra está lista para su segundo partido de la Copa del Mundo
headlines.description: La selección de Inglaterra realizó su entrada en calor en Boston antes de enfrentar a Ghana. Harry Kane, Jude Bellingham y compañía buscan una nueva victoria para acercarse a los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

headlines.title: Jozy Altidore: “Inglaterra tiene que mejorar defensivamente” | Pasión Mundial
headlines.description: Nuestros expertos ya están en Boston para el enfrentamiento entre Inglaterra y Ghana. Jozy Altidore y Adriana Monsalve detectan deficiencias defensivas en los “Tres Leones”.

headlines.title: Roberto Martínez reacciona a los goles de Cristiano Ronaldo: "Era cuestión de tiempo"
headlines.description: El técnico de la Selección de Portugal habló tras el partido donde su equipo goleó 5-0, con los primeros goles de su estrella.

headlines.title: ¡El Show de CR7! Portugal golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán y se repone en el Mundial.
headlines.description: Portugal demuestra por qué son favoritos al título y golea 5-0 a Uzbekistán en Houston. Cristiano Ronaldo brilló con un doblete que encaminó la victoria y lo pone como figura del partido.
